description: Source file defining the RecipeEditorScreen widget for editing or creating recipes in a Flutter application. It includes UI components, state management, and actions for handling recipe data.

classes.name: RecipeEditorScreen
classes.description: A StatefulWidget for editing or creating recipes.

classes.name: _RecipeEditorScreenState
classes.description: State class managing the UI and logic for RecipeEditorScreen.

classes.name: _CardSection
classes.description: A StatelessWidget used to display sections within the recipe editor form.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes text controllers with data from the initial recipe.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the text controllers to free resources.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the UI for the recipe editor screen.

methods.name: _buildRecipeIfValid
methods.description: Validates and constructs a Recipe object from the input fields.

methods.name: _showSnack
methods.description: Displays a SnackBar with a message.

methods.name: _showDeleteDialog
methods.description: Displays a confirmation dialog for deleting a recipe.
